ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the device last synchronized with the server */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, lost) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Last known location of the device (latitude, longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_sensors" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "calibration_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sensor needs calibration */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated for this device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id", "sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that took the reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "value_x" REAL /* X-axis value of the reading */,
  "value_y" REAL /* Y-axis value of the reading */,
  "value_z" REAL /* Z-axis value of the reading */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor reading (e.g., m/s², degrees) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the reading */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the reading (e.g., GPS, Bluetooth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "height" REAL /* User's height in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* User's weight in kilograms */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* User's activity level (e.g., sedentary, active) */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Any health conditions the user has (e.g., diabetes, hypertension) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started using the device */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the user stopped using the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user's relationship with the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., walking, running) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity in meters */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  "heart_rate_avg" REAL /* Average heart rate during the activity */,
  "heart_rate_max" REAL /* Maximum heart rate during the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity took place (latitude, longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_readings" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the reading within the activity */,
  "readings_type" TEXT /* Type of reading (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id", "reading_id")
)
